overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a rural dirt road through open prairie. The weather transitions from partly cloudy to a dramatic storm with dark clouds, while a horse rider and later a horse-drawn carriage pass by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road through grassy prairie with utility poles

events.description: storm clouds begin gathering and darkening the sky from the horizon
horse rider passes by on the right side of the road moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road, observing the changing weather conditions

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting past the character on the right side of the road

entered.detail: wooden electrical poles with wires running parallel to the road on the left side
unpaved dirt road with visible tire tracks and patches of grass
tall green grass fields flanking both sides of the road
scattered oak trees dotting the rolling landscape
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie landscape with a character walking along a dirt road. Wooden utility poles line the left side while scattered oaks dot the grasslands. A horse rider passes by on the right as storm clouds begin gathering on the horizon, gradually darkening the previously sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with approaching storm front

events.description: sky darkens significantly as heavy storm clouds obscure the sun

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the road as the storm approaches and lighting dims

entered.detail: large leafy deciduous tree on the right side of the road with dense green canopy

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the environment grows darker under the approaching storm. The scattered oaks fade behind while a large deciduous tree appears on the right. The utility poles draw closer on the left, and the sky transitions from partly cloudy to heavily overcast with dark storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie path beneath heavy storm clouds

events.description: environment becomes very dark under heavy storm clouds with dramatic lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the increasingly dark landscape as the storm intensifies overhead

entered.detail: gnarled dead tree trunk with bare branches on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The storm reaches its peak intensity with very dark clouds covering the sky. The large deciduous tree moves closer on the right before passing behind, while a distinctive dead tree trunk appears ahead on the right. The landscape takes on a dramatic, moody atmosphere with low light conditions.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the road as a carriage passes by and moves ahead

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wooden wagon with driver moving past and ahead on the road

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right and moves ahead down the road. The character continues walking through the stormy landscape as the trees pass behind. The dirt trail stretches forward toward the distant mountains under the dark, turbulent sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt road as a bright prairie landscape is gradually consumed by a dramatic storm. It begins with a character walking past wooden utility poles and scattered oaks under a sunny sky, just as a horse rider passes by and dark clouds begin to gather on the horizon. As the character advances, the lighting dims and the sky transitions to a heavy overcast, shifting the focus toward a large deciduous tree on the right while the utility poles draw closer. The atmosphere then grows increasingly moody and dark as the storm reaches its peak, passing a distinctive dead tree trunk under a turbulent, low-light sky. Finally, a horse-drawn carriage rolls past on the right and moves ahead, leaving the character to continue along the trail toward distant mountains beneath the oppressive clouds.
